expectations.text: Task decomposition performed — breaks feature into individual TDD tasks with user confirmation
expectations.evidence: Decomposed into 8 incremental tasks from 'add(1,2) returns 3' through 'divide(10,0) throws ArithmeticException'. Presented to user for confirmation.

expectations.text: Sequential Agent calls instead of TeamCreate/TaskCreate/SendMessage
expectations.evidence: Uses Agent tool calls for RED, GREEN, REFACTOR phases. No TeamCreate, TaskCreate, or SendMessage mentioned.

expectations.text: Cycle summary displayed after each cycle
expectations.evidence: After each cycle shows RED/GREEN/REFACTOR status with checkmarks, test counts, and files changed.
Shows [x]/[>]/[ ] checklist format after cycle 2 with 8 tasks tracked.
